prompt_plan: The robotic arm approaches the banana resting on the table. The gripper aligns with the long axis of the banana, then gently closes to pinch the fruit at its midpoint with just enough pressure to prevent slippage.
With the banana securely grasped, the arm lifts it vertically off the table while keeping it horizontal. The banana rises steadily, clearing the surface.
Holding the banana horizontally above the table, the arm sweeps laterally toward the basket in a smooth arc. The fruit stays level throughout the transit.
Arriving above the basket, the arm makes fine positional adjustments to center the banana over the opening, then lowers it steadily into the basket's grid structure.
The banana settles into the basket with a slight depression on contact. The gripper opens to release the fruit, then retracts upward to its initial rest position.

prompt_plan: The robotic arm scans the workspace and identifies the green bowl on the table, distinguishing it clearly from any other objects. The arm extends forward and positions its open gripper directly above the green bowl, aligning precisely with the green bowl's circular rim. The gripper hovers steadily, ready to descend.

The robotic arm lowers its gripper downward toward the green bowl in a controlled descent. As the gripper reaches the green bowl's rim, it closes firmly and tightly around the outer edge of the green bowl, clamping down with strong, secure force. The green bowl is locked solidly in the gripper's grasp with no wobble or slippage.

With the green bowl clamped tightly in its gripper, the robotic arm lifts the green bowl vertically off the table in a slow, steady upward motion. The green bowl remains perfectly level and stable throughout the ascent, held securely without any tilting or swaying. The arm raises the green bowl well above the table surface.

The robotic arm carries the green bowl horizontally through the air toward the pink plate, maintaining its firm, unyielding grip throughout the entire transit. The green bowl stays perfectly level without any rocking or dipping. The arm arrives above the pink plate and makes fine positional adjustments to center the green bowl directly over the middle of the pink plate.

The robotic arm lowers the green bowl slowly and steadily downward until the green bowl's base makes gentle contact with the pink plate surface. The gripper gradually loosens and carefully opens its fingers to release the green bowl, which settles securely onto the pink plate. The robotic arm retracts upward smoothly and returns to its initial rest position.
Put green bowl into pink plate.

Both grippers simultaneously close firmly onto the box flaps, clamping down tightly on each flap. With both flaps still tightly gripped, the robotic arms push the box flaps downward and fold them over the top opening of the box. The flaps are pressed flat against the box surface, tucking them securely into the closure position on top of the cardboard box.

Both robotic arms release the folded flaps and retract upward above the box. The arms reposition themselves directly over the top center of the box, raising the grippers high to prepare for a downward pressing motion to secure the box flaps firmly in place.

Both robotic arms lift the open container off the table together, keeping it level and steady. The arms carry the container horizontally toward the pink plate on the right side, positioning it directly above the plate edge with the chips still inside.

Both arms tilt the container at a steep angle over the pink plate, pouring all the chips out of the container onto the pink plate surface. The arms shake the container gently to empty it completely, then place the empty container back on the table and retract to their rest positions.

prompt_plan: Both robotic arms extend inward toward the white T-shirt laid flat on the table. The left arm positions its open gripper above the left edge of the shirt. The right arm positions its open gripper above the right edge of the shirt.
The left arm lowers its gripper and grips the left edge of the white shirt firmly, pinching the fabric at the left sleeve area.

The left arm lifts the left edge of the shirt and folds it inward toward the center along the vertical axis, folding the left sleeve and left body panel over the middle of the shirt. The left arm presses the folded fabric flat against the table.
The left arm releases the fabric and retracts. The right arm lowers its gripper and grips the right edge of the white shirt firmly, pinching the fabric at the right sleeve area.

The right arm lifts the right edge of the shirt and folds it inward toward the center along the vertical axis, folding the right sleeve and right body panel over the previous fold. The right arm presses the folded fabric flat. The shirt is now a narrow vertical rectangle.

The right arm releases the fabric and retracts. Both arms reposition above the narrow folded shirt. The left arm grips the left edge and the right arm grips the right edge of the narrow rectangle, preparing to fold it even narrower.
Both arms fold the left and right edges inward once more, making the shirt into an even narrower vertical strip. Both arms press the fabric flat against the table.
Both arms release the fabric and reposition to the bottom hem of the narrow folded shirt. Both grippers open and descend to grip the bottom edge of the shirt firmly.

Both arms lift the bottom edge of the shirt and fold it upward toward the top, creating a horizontal fold at the midpoint. The arms press the folded fabric flat against the table. The shirt is now a compact rectangle.
Both arms release the fabric and reposition. The left arm grips the bottom edge of the compact rectangle, preparing for a second horizontal fold.
The left arm lifts the bottom edge and folds it upward again toward the top, creating a smaller, thicker square. The left arm presses the folded fabric flat against the table.
The left arm presses down firmly on the folded shirt to flatten all layers and ensure the folds are crisp and secure.
The left arm opens its gripper wide and descends onto the folded shirt, gripping it firmly from above to pick it up.
The left arm lifts the neatly folded shirt off the table and holds it in the air. The folded shirt remains compact and intact. Both arms retract to their rest positions.

The right arm presses down on the tape once more to secure it completely onto the brown cardboard box. The right arm then releases and retracts upward. The left arm also releases the tape dispenser and retracts to its rest position.
